title: Savory Moroccan Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic Moroccan-inspired dish featuring chicken cooked in a savory and spicy sauce.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with savory spice mix, moroccan seasoning, and flaky salt.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, heat the chicken broth and lemon juice in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the saucepan and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and brush the savory sauce over the top.
Return the chicken to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the sauce is caramelized.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
